title: 'Trump's anti-NATO outbursts have undeniably weakened the Atlantic pact'
subhead: By disparaging the North Atlantic Treaty Organization, Trump perhaps aims to assign blame for the United States' setbacks in the Gulf on Europe, columnist Alain Frachon wonders.

title: First non-Iranian oil tanker crosses Strait of Hormuz since ceasefire
'Such carnage defies belief': Lebanon, crushed by Israeli bombs, counts its dead
Vladimir Putin announces Orthodox Easter ceasefire in Ukraine war
subhead: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky had proposed a temporary truce earlier this week.

title: Macron to meet Pope Leo XIV on Friday to discuss a world in crisis
subhead: The French president and the American pontiff are expected to address conflicts in Lebanon and Iran and contemporary issues such as the dangers posed by the development of artificial intelligence.

title: World Press Photo 2026: Abdulmonam Eassa honored for his coverage of the war in Sudan for Le Monde
subhead: French-Syrian photojournalist Abdulmonam Eassa received the prestigious World Press Photo award on Thursday in the 'Stories' category for his photo report 'War in Sudan, A Nation Trapped,' carried out in October 2024 and December 2025 for Le Monde.

title: Denis Charbit: 'The Israeli lawmakers who established the death penalty merely obeyed their own instincts for vengeance'
subhead: The professor at the Open University of Israel looks into the recent law introducing the death penalty for Palestinians convicted of terrorist acts and anti-Israeli attacks. He sees it as a grave moral regression and is concerned about Israel abandoning 'thousands of years of ethics.'

Mysterious 'knocker' continues haunting elderly women in Brittany town
subhead: For the past three years in the village of Goudelin, someone has taken pleasure in harassing women living alone, often elderly, by pounding on their doors in the middle of the night. Around 30 victims have been identified. Speculation is rampant about the knocker's identity, and the victims are finally being heard.

title: Trump's escalatory rhetoric raises questions over his mental health
subhead: Members of Congress, stunned by the crude and genocidal language used by the president, have begun to discuss the US Constitution's 25th Amendment, which allows for the president to be declared unfit and for executive powers to be transferred to the vice president.

title: In catacombs, museums, and labs, the delicate heritage of human remains
subhead: The Paris Catacombs reopen to the public on Wednesday, April 8, after five months of renovations. The timing offers a chance to reflect on how human remains are handled in cultural and research institutions. These singular relics pose ethical, technical and legal questions.
